name: Ifenprodil
description: Ifenprodil is a selective NMDA receptor (glutamate) antagonist.

interactions.name: Urokinase
interactions.description: Ifenprodil may increase the anticoagulant activities of Urokinase.

interactions.name: Mefloquine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Ifenprodil can be decreased when used in combination with Mefloquine.
